Keywords: push navigation transition screen slide stack
Do: Slide new screen in from right; outgoing screen slides partially left (parallax offset); matches platform default
Don't: Custom transitions that fight platform direction (e.g., slide up for drill-down); excessive blur transitions on older devices
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: cross-dissolve/fade 150ms instead of slide; RN: Animated.timing with very short duration; SwiftUI: .transition(.opacity)

Keywords: pop navigation back swipe slide out
Do: Slide current screen out to right; previous screen slides in from left; iOS: interactive swipe drives animation
Don't: Instant dismiss without animation; different direction than push (breaks mental model)
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: cross-dissolve 150ms; maintain direction consistency even in reduced motion

Keywords: modal sheet present slide up
Do: Slide sheet up from bottom with spring; dim background (scrim) fades in simultaneously; grab handle appears
Don't: Hard pop-in without spring (feels abrupt); slow over 500ms (feels laggy); no scrim (depth perception lost)
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: fade in 200ms instead of slide up; no spring animation

Keywords: modal sheet dismiss swipe down
Do: Slide sheet down to bottom; scrim fades out simultaneously; proportional to swipe if gesture-driven
Don't: Hard snap-dismiss without slide out; faster than presentation (unbalanced); keep scrim after sheet gone
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: fade out 150ms; snap dismiss acceptable

Keywords: shared element hero transition image expand
Do: Match source frame exactly → animate bounds to destination; fade crossfade overlapping views 150ms into transition; use matchedGeometryEffect (SwiftUI) or shared element (Compose Compose 1.7+)
Don't: Shared element on list with 20+ visible items (performance); mismatched bounds causing jump; skipping matching step
Performance Impact: High — avoid with 20+ items in list
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: simple cross-dissolve 250ms between source and destination screens; remove hero animation; use modal scale instead

Keywords: tab switch bottom bar navigation transition
Do: Cross-dissolve between tab content; icon animates (scale 1→0.85→1 bounce for selected); color shifts to active
Don't: Slide animation between tabs (break mental model of peer sections); heavy transition for frequent action
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: no transition animation; instant tab switch; icon color change only

Keywords: page swipe horizontal pager scroll snap
Do: Track finger 1:1; snap to nearest page on release; page control dots update with scroll position
Don't: Page snap that's too fast (disorienting) or too slow (feels stuck); no snap (user stops on partial page)
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: instant page change on button press; disable swipe gesture on reduced motion page

Keywords: skeleton shimmer loading placeholder pulse
Do: Gradient sheen moves left-to-right repeating; 60% base color 100% highlight color; match content shape exactly
Don't: Fast/jarring shimmer; shimmer on already-loaded content; very high contrast shimmer colors
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: static placeholder without animation (just gray shape); no shimmer movement

Keywords: pull to refresh spinner loading indicator gesture driven
Easing: ease-out for pull; spring for release
Do: Spinner tracks pull distance proportionally (0% → 100% revealed); snap to spinner position at threshold; haptic on threshold cross
Don't: Animating spinner before threshold; spinner that doesn't stop after data loaded; no haptic at trigger
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: instant trigger at pull threshold; minimal spinner; no elastic pull animation

Keywords: list items stagger fade appear loading content
Do: Items fade in + slide up 12-16pt; stagger 30ms between items (max 8 items staggered then instant after)
Don't: Animating 50+ items in sequence (janky); slow stagger that feels like loading delay; items appearing in wrong order
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: instant appear all items; no stagger; skip if list is refreshing existing content

Keywords: list row delete swipe left action animation
Do: Row slides left revealing red action button; row collapses vertically on confirm delete 300ms ease-in-out; remaining items fill gap with spring
Don't: Hard snap at half-swipe; no collapse animation after delete (jarring content jump); delete without undo opportunity
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: highlight row briefly on delete; instant collapse without animation

Keywords: bottom sheet drag expand collapse detent snap
Do: Track drag 1:1; snap to nearest detent on release; velocity-aware snap (fast swipe → skips to next detent); dimmer intensity proportional to sheet height
Don't: Snapping without spring (stiff); not following finger 1:1 during drag; dimmer that doesn't track sheet height
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: fade in at target detent directly; no drag-proportional animation

Keywords: toggle switch state change on off
Easing: spring bouncy for iOS / ease-out for Android
Do: Thumb slides smoothly; track fills/empties with color; haptic at toggle point
Don't: Instant state change without animation (mechanical feel); very slow toggle (>300ms) that delays interaction
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: instant visual state change; maintain haptic even in reduced motion (haptic ≠ animation)

Keywords: spinner activity indicator circular loading
Do: System-default spinner with spinner color matching brand; show after 300ms content delay (avoid flash for fast loads)
Don't: Custom spinner that's too complex (distracts); not showing completion state; infinite spinner for determinate progress
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: static 'Loading...' text label; don't animate; notify completion via live region announcement

Keywords: success checkmark confetti celebration complete
Do: Checkmark draws with spring animation 400ms; optional brief scale pop (1→1.08→1 200ms spring); haptic .success; disappears after 2s or on next interaction
Don't: Overlong celebration (>800ms) blocking next action; confetti for minor routine tasks; no haptic with visual success
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: static checkmark icon; no animation; haptic still appropriate

Keywords: error shake validation input wrong password field
Do: Horizontal shake ±8pt with 4 rapid oscillations; haptic .error simultaneously; error text appears below field with fade-in
Don't: Gentle barely-visible shake (unclear); vertical shake (non-standard); shake without haptic; shake for warnings (reserve for errors)
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: static error border color + error text; no shake; haptic still appropriate for .error

Keywords: fab extended morph expand collapse action
Do: Small FAB expands to Extended FAB (icon left + label right) on scroll up / collapse on scroll down; icon crossfades during expansion
Don't: Morphing so fast text isn't readable; morphing for every scroll event (debounce); morphing on iOS (no native FAB)
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: instant state switch between small/extended FAB without animation; label appears/disappears instantly

Keywords: keyboard keyboard appear input push content animation
Do: Scroll view or container adjusts upward as keyboard slides in; proportional to keyboard height; no delay
Don't: Custom keyboard offset that doesn't match keyboard timing (content slides before keyboard appears); abrupt jump
Performance Impact: Low — driven by system keyboard notification
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: system keyboard animation is already minimal; key is ensuring content is still reachable above keyboard

Keywords: haptic visual sync simultaneous feedback confirm
Do: Trigger visuals and haptics within same frame (16ms); use UIImpactFeedbackGenerator.impactOccurred() and UI update in same cycle
Don't: Haptic delayed 200ms after visual change (breaks sensation of physical response); haptic without any visual feedback
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: haptic still appropriate even in Reduce Motion; only animations are reduced not haptics

Keywords: lottie animation json vector complex animation
Do: Use for complex illustrations onboarding empty states success states; 120fps capable; dark mode variants via design tokens
Don't: Lottie for simple spinners or loading (use system default); 10MB+ animation files; autoplaying ambient animations in loops
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: show first or last frame as static image; LottieAnimationView.setSpeed(0); Lottie has reduceMotion property

Keywords: page indicator dot pager swipe transition
Do: Active dot expands slightly (8→10pt) with color fill; inactive dots are smaller outline; cross-fade on page change
Don't: Custom shapes that aren't dots (confusing); dots that don't update live during swipe; hiding indicator with >3 pages
Reduced Motion Handling: Reduce: dots still update position but without transition animation; instant state change
